zh.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ely是Walter de Elye和Mrs Walter de Elye的兒子，於大約1190年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾武特比。他於1220年之前與Mrs Ralph De Elye在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ely是Walter de Elye和Mrs Walter de Elye的儿子，于大约1190年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾武特比。他于1220年之前与Mrs Ralph De Elye在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ely, a cathedral city on an island in the fens north of Cambridge, so named from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + gē ‘district’.
English, French, and Breton (Finistère): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Elie, Hely (Elijah in the King James Bible); see Ellis and Elias .
English: variant of   Healey  .

variants.name: Ellis
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elis, an Old French vernacular form of Elias, the Latin and New Testament Greek form of Hebrew Eliyahu; see Elijah and compare Elias , Lias , Ely .
English: possibly in some instances from the Middle English female personal name Elice, a pet form of Elizabeth .

Welsh: from Elis, a shortened form of the Welsh personal name Elisse (earlier Elisedd, a derivative of elus ‘kindly, benevolent’). As usual in Welsh, the stress in Elisse is on the penultimate syllable -li-, which shifts to initial El- when the name is shortened to Elis. It later became confused with Ellis in 1 above.

variants.name: Iley
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name from Brent Eleigh or Monks Eleigh in Suffolk, or perhaps from Illey in Worcestershire. The Suffolk placename derives from an Old English personal name Illa (genitive Illan) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hilla or Illa + lēah. Alternatively, the name may be a variant of Ely .
Perhaps an Americanized form of German   Ihle  .

variants.name: Elley
meanings: English: variant of   Ely   or   Ella  .

variants.name: Ealy
meanings: English: variant of   Ely  .

variants.name: Eley
meanings: English: variant of   Ely  .
German: from a vernacular form of the medieval personal name Eligius (see Eligio ), a Christian saint's name.

variants.name: Ealey
meanings: English: variant of   Ely  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ely was born about 1190, in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Walter de Elye and Mrs Walter de Elye. He married Mrs Ralph De Elye before 1220, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Ralph d’Ely est né environ 1190, à Utterby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Walter d’Elye et Mrs Walter d’Elye. Il a épousé Mrs Ralph De Elye avant 1220, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ely wurde um 1190 in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Walter de Elye und Mrs Walter de Elye geboren. Er hat vor 1220 in England, United Kingdom Mrs Ralph De Elye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ely è nato il circa 1190 nel Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Walter de Elye e Mrs Walter de Elye. Lui sposato Mrs Ralph De Elye prima del 1220, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Elyは約1190年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウッテルビーでWalter de ElyeとMrs Walter de Elyeの息子として生まれた。1220年以前にイギリスイギリスでMrs Ralph De Elyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ely(은)는 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 우터비에서 Walter de Elye(와)과 Mrs Walter de Elye의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1220년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Mrs Ralph De Elye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ely nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Walter de Elye e Mrs Walter de Elye. Ele casou-se com Mrs Ralph De Elye antes 1220, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ely родился около 1190 г. в местности уттирби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Walter de Elye и Mrs Walter de Elye. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Ralph De Elye перед 1220 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ely nació aproximadamente 1190, en Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Walter de Elye y Mrs Walter de Elye. Se casó con Mrs Ralph De Elye antes de 1220, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija.
